title: World Pack List
description: The world_behavior_packs.json and world_resource_packs.json files define which add-on packs are active for a world. Located in the root of a world folder.

0.description:
Properties:
• pack_id (string)
• version (string)

Sample values:
• world_behavior_packs: {"pack_id":"12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789ab...

packs.title: Packs
packs.description: An array of pack registrations defining which packs are active.
